stemHtml: In a modern commercial aircraft, what is the purpose of the standby instruments?

options.a: They are intended for use when the main displays are difficult to see from certain angles.
options.b: They are used as the primary reference because they are simpler in design.
options.c: They provide essential backup information in case of primary flight display failure.
options.d: They are only used during abnormal procedures such as engine failure.
